title: Create hyperlink to board/doc in another workspace
excerpt:
Allow the creation of a link in one workspace to a board or doc in another workspace along the left worspaces panel. 
For example within a department workspace, it would be nice to link to a board in the main workspace a…

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Allow the creation of a link in one workspace to a board or doc in another workspace along the left worspaces panel.

For example within a department workspace, it would be nice to link to a board in the main workspace as if its in the departmental workspace. Obviously the permissions would come from the actual board.

This way a department can keep to their workspace but easily access needed boards in another workspace, including the main workspace.

An example use case is a company with several business verticals, that while their primary sales processes run independent, need the ability to easily view a main accounts board that is shared. While its not that hard to bookmark it, or add to favorites - this requires the user to do this. Providing our users with a defined experience, workflow, and process is critical to adoption. Salescritters are very change adverse - anything which they see as a burden to using a system is enough reason to ignore the system and go rogue creating chaos for the organization.

posts.author: kganders (Kris Anderson)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be great. We are running into this issue now, where a “special team” has their boards but also interact on shared boards in another workspace… But the manager of the “special team” wants all the applicable boards easily accessible from the same navigation.

posts.author: sharonr (Sharon R)
posts.cookedHtml:
Bumping this
We have one workspace for creating marketing assets and another where the UA marketing team works. It would really help to have a way to add shortcuts to certain views from the creative workspace to the sidebar of the marketing workspace.

Dashboards right now are really limited in functioning (no group by, no item multi-select, no sorting) and having to switch between workspaces every time is time consuming.

posts.author: i.moreno (Ignacio Moreno Ortega [Decadis AG])
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!,
I am part of the Decadis team and I would like to recommend you our applications:

With sumUp for monday → Group By Widgets, you can group key metrics and calculate sums in an extra row at the bottom.

With Batch Hero for monday, you can sort your boards in an ascending or descending order by board type, board name or any other attribute in the overview.

If you need assistance on how to use the application, please, feel free to create a request in our support portal , we will be happy to help you.

Best regards,
Nacho
